item.title: Bringing a New Bull Gator Home
item.description: Chandler’s Wild Life shares a respectful look at bringing a new bull gator home and observing its behavior in a controlled setting.

media:content.media:title: Bringing a New Bull Gator Home
media:content.media:description: Chandler’s Wild Life shares a respectful look at bringing a new bull gator home and observing its behavior in a controlled setting.

item.title: Chandler’s Most Venomous Snakes
item.description: A look at Chandler’s Wild Life and several venomous snakes, with a focus on observation, education, and respectful wildlife care.

media:content.media:title: Chandler’s Most Venomous Snakes
media:content.media:description: A look at Chandler’s Wild Life and several venomous snakes, with a focus on observation, education, and respectful wildlife care.

item.title: Rare venomous snake collections with Chandler's Wild
item.description: Explore rare venomous snake collections and learn about the species, care, and scientific importance behind these unique reptiles.

media:content.media:title: Rare venomous snake collections with Chandler's Wild
media:content.media:description: Explore rare venomous snake collections and learn about the species, care, and scientific importance behind these unique reptiles.

item.title: Africa’s Venomous Snake Spotlight
item.description: Explore some of Africa’s most venomous snake species, their traits, habitats, and their role in the ecosystem.

media:content.media:title: Africa’s Venomous Snake Spotlight
media:content.media:description: Explore some of Africa’s most venomous snake species, their traits, habitats, and their role in the ecosystem.
